canonical_name: Other islands, indistinct in the mist
an old fairy fort at the top of a hill
an island which is like the shape of a coiled dragon-
a child of the Great Marriage between the king and the land
the very land of Brittany which is mother and father to me
the great center of the old Mysteries
one of the old fairy forts where, they say, a hundred years can pass in a night
the building where nets and snares were kept
the far side of the Island
the enclosure near the House of Maidens
the paths in and out of Avalon
the lover of my mother who was Lady here before me
any man who meant more to me
any man save yourself who came near to matching me in strength-
a wiser man of his years
